reviews.author: Savanna Brown
reviews.text: The best, most informative tea tasting! I was able to try three different teas and I went home with one but I know I’ll be back for more. Booking online is super easy and you get a confirmation email once the appointment is accepted.
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman mencicipi teh terbaik dan paling informatif! Saya berkesempatan mencoba tiga jenis teh berbeda dan membawa pulang satu, tetapi saya yakin akan kembali lagi untuk mencoba yang lain. Pemesanan online sangat mudah dan Anda akan menerima email konfirmasi setelah janji temu diterima.

reviews.author: JoAnn Simmons
reviews.text: I just had some Pad Thai.  Shrimp and Chicken.  Loved it from there. Well they are putting baby shrimp in it, found 3 and chicken 3 small pieces.  No taste, very salty today.  Not what I expected today.  I guess I must find a new place.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya baru saja makan Pad Thai. Udang dan ayam. Saya suka sekali. Tapi ternyata mereka menggunakan udang kecil, saya menemukan 3 ekor dan ayam 3 potong kecil. Rasanya hambar, sangat asin hari ini. Bukan seperti yang saya harapkan. Sepertinya saya harus mencari tempat lain.

reviews.author: Riley Gibson
reviews.text: I tried the General Tso’s chicken at Wicked Tea Cafe and wow… it was seriously so good. The chicken was perfectly crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, and the sauce had that ideal balance of sweet, savory, and just a little kick of heat. It wasn’t overly greasy, and the portion was generous. Everything tasted fresh and full of flavor. Definitely one of the best General Tso’s I’ve had in a long time. I’ll absolutely be ordering it again!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya mencoba ayam General Tso di Wicked Tea Cafe dan wow… sungguh enak sekali. Ayamnya renyah sempurna di luar, lembut di dalam, dan sausnya memiliki keseimbangan rasa manis, gurih, dan sedikit pedas yang ideal. Tidak terlalu berminyak, dan porsinya banyak. Semuanya terasa segar dan penuh cita rasa. Pasti salah satu ayam General Tso terbaik yang pernah saya makan dalam waktu lama. Saya pasti akan memesannya lagi!

reviews.author: Peter Jefferson
reviews.text: Everything is fresh and delicious  crab rangoon so delicious  sesame chicken 6 stars so delicious
reviews.textTranslated: Semuanya segar dan lezat, crab rangoon sangat enak, ayam wijen bintang 6 sangat enak.

reviews.author: tina 2112
reviews.text:
Hi all! Ordered Super Bowl takeout from Wicked Tea Cafe here in my town of Mansfield Ma. and, as usual, outstanding meal. Insanely good food. Of course crab rangoon, veg lo mein, House rice, lobster sauce, orange chix, and white bbq sauce wings and General Tsao wings. Im too full to describe it all. Ning and Ian are perfect hosts and the crew produce the freshest Chinese food Ive ever found. Crispy things are properly crispy- crab Rangoon, scallion pancakes, spring rolls. Silky things are properly silky- lobster sauce, boneless ribs, veg lo mein. Hearty things are properly hearty- basil beef, orange chix, House fried rice, chix with cashews, chix with mushrooms.
Chow foon, drunken noodles, and curry will be in our upcoming orders. We always get our usual favorites and rotate in at least one new thing to try. Which of course leads us to more "usual favorites". We spend a lot per person, but we ALways get enough for leftovers the next day, and we ALways add things we've not tried before because this place is just that good! Next time, I'll take pics. We dug in too quickly to take any :D
Never disappointed with our orders. Sincerely a joy, all around. :D
-tina s.
PS- forgot to add that I've also bought loose tea, specifically Golden Roasted Buckwheat, Lychee Peach, Cream of Asian Pear, and Lavender Mango, all of which are delicious, and I've bought bags to send to my son and fiancee overseas. The tea often goes to work with me. :D
reviews.textTranslated:
Hai semuanya! Saya memesan makanan untuk dibawa pulang saat Super Bowl dari Wicked Tea Cafe di kota saya, Mansfield, Massachusetts, dan seperti biasa, makanannya luar biasa. Makanannya sangat enak. Tentu saja, crab rangoon, veg lo mein, nasi House, saus lobster, ayam jeruk, dan sayap ayam saus BBQ putih serta sayap ayam General Tsao. Saya terlalu kenyang untuk menjelaskan semuanya. Ning dan Ian adalah tuan rumah yang sempurna dan kru mereka menyajikan makanan Cina paling segar yang pernah saya temukan. Makanan yang renyah benar-benar renyah - crab rangoon, panekuk daun bawang, lumpia. Makanan yang lembut benar-benar lembut - saus lobster, iga tanpa tulang, veg lo mein. Makanan yang mengenyangkan benar-benar mengenyangkan - daging sapi basil, ayam jeruk, nasi goreng House, ayam dengan kacang mete, ayam dengan jamur.
Chow foon, drunken noodles, dan kari akan ada dalam pesanan kami berikutnya. Kami selalu memesan favorit kami yang biasa dan mencoba setidaknya satu menu baru. Yang tentu saja membawa kami ke lebih banyak "favorit yang biasa". Kami menghabiskan banyak uang per orang, tetapi kami SELALU mendapatkan cukup makanan untuk sisa keesokan harinya, dan kami SELALU menambahkan hal-hal yang belum pernah kami coba sebelumnya karena tempat ini memang seenak itu! Lain kali, saya akan mengambil foto. Kami makan terlalu cepat sehingga tidak sempat mengambil foto :D
Tidak pernah kecewa dengan pesanan kami. Sungguh menyenangkan, secara keseluruhan. :D
-tina s.
PS- lupa menambahkan bahwa saya juga membeli teh daun lepas, khususnya Golden Roasted Buckwheat, Lychee Peach, Cream of Asian Pear, dan Lavender Mango, semuanya enak, dan saya juga membeli teh celup untuk dikirim ke putra dan tunangan saya di luar negeri. Tehnya sering saya bawa ke tempat kerja. :D

reviews.author: Saheli Goswami
reviews.text: The food was one of the most bland ones that we have ever tasted. We ordered miso ramen, drunken noodles, and fried rice. Honestly, I make 10 times better ramen with store-bought cup noodles. The broth tasted nothing like miso and seemed to contain only soy sauce, in the name of seasoning and flavor. The protein in our dishes (chicken) was not fresh either. We ordered more than $100 in dishes and are struggling to decide which is worse: eat them or throw them away.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan di sana adalah salah satu yang paling hambar yang pernah kami cicipi. Kami memesan ramen miso, drunken noodles, dan nasi goreng. Jujur saja, saya bisa membuat ramen 10 kali lebih enak dengan mi instan kemasan. Kuahnya sama sekali tidak terasa seperti miso dan sepertinya hanya mengandung kecap asin, sebagai bumbu dan penambah rasa. Protein dalam hidangan kami (ayam) juga tidak segar. Kami memesan makanan senilai lebih dari $100 dan kesulitan memutuskan mana yang lebih buruk: memakannya atau membuangnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
We’re genuinely disappointed to read this, as it does not reflect our food, our process, or the feedback we receive from the vast majority of our guests.

To clarify a few factual points for anyone reading: our ramen broth bases are imported directly from Japan, and our ramen components are built from authentic ingredients, not shortcuts. Due to the size of our kitchen and the volume we do, we purchase fresh chicken daily or every other day at most. Our inventory turns so quickly that it would be impossible for us to serve old or stale protein — it simply does not sit long enough to do so.

Flavor is subjective, and we fully understand that not every style of ramen or Asian cuisine will suit every palate. However, stating that our broth “contained only soy sauce” or that our ingredients were not fresh is objectively incorrect.

We would have welcomed the opportunity to address any concerns directly had they been raised with us at the time. We stand behind our ingredients, our sourcing, and the care that goes into every dish we serve.

If you’d like to discuss your experience further, we’re always open to a direct conversation.

— Wicked Tea Cafe

reviews.author: Anna Silkwood
reviews.text:
Good value and tasty! We got an entree to share for $16 + an app/add on like an egg roll. The online ordering on their website was easy and timing for pickup was accurate. They don't notify you when your food is ready, so make sure you pay attention to the pickup time. Ask for utensils/chopsticks & napkins as those weren't provided.

The egg roll could've been a bit crispier. A lot of places have more breading than chicken - these were thick pieces of meat. Loved that!

Honestly, this was more than enough for 2 normal serving sizes. Or 1 person if you're crazy hungry. I'll definitely be back to try more on the menu and maybe sit down inside next time and try their teas!
reviews.textTranslated:
Harga terjangkau dan rasanya enak! Kami memesan hidangan utama untuk dibagi seharga $16 + makanan pembuka/tambahan seperti lumpia. Pemesanan online di situs web mereka mudah dan waktu pengambilan tepat. Mereka tidak memberi tahu Anda saat makanan Anda siap, jadi pastikan Anda memperhatikan waktu pengambilan. Mintalah peralatan makan/sumpit & serbet karena tidak disediakan.

Lumpia bisa sedikit lebih renyah. Banyak tempat menggunakan lebih banyak tepung roti daripada ayam - di sini potongan dagingnya tebal. Saya suka itu!

Jujur, ini lebih dari cukup untuk 2 porsi ukuran normal. Atau 1 orang jika Anda sangat lapar. Saya pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba lebih banyak menu dan mungkin duduk di dalam ruangan lain kali dan mencoba teh mereka!

reviews.author: M R (M)
reviews.text: 10 out of 10 for food and drinks.
reviews.textTranslated: Nilai 10 dari 10 untuk makanan dan minuman.

reviews.author: Kevin Parker
reviews.text: By far the best Chinese I’ve had to date! The portion sizes were perfect, and the food was spectacular. This was my first visit and I’m looking forward to many return visits!
reviews.textTranslated: Sejauh ini, ini adalah restoran Cina terbaik yang pernah saya kunjungi! Porsinya pas, dan makanannya luar biasa. Ini kunjungan pertama saya dan saya menantikan kunjungan berikutnya!

reviews.author: kevin parker
reviews.text: Got the general tsos and the AC3 combination plate!! Couldn't be more pleased! Portions were just enough, the general tsos was as hot as it SHOULD be, and was still very warm when we brought it home 15 minutes away! We will definitely be coming back!!
reviews.textTranslated: Dapat General Tsos dan piring kombinasi AC3!! Seneng banget! Porsinya pas, General Tsos-nya pedas seperti seharusnya, dan masih hangat banget waktu kami bawa pulang 15 menit perjalanan! Kami pasti akan kembali lagi!!

reviews.author: irtiza ali
reviews.text: Very rude service. I ordered General Tso’s Chicken over the phone but they made the wrong dish, then argued instead of fixing it politely. When I got home, there was no rice — which should’ve been clearly mentioned on the menu if it’s not included. The woman at the counter was disrespectful, but one male staff member was kind and helped issue the refund
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya sangat tidak sopan. Saya memesan Ayam Jenderal Tso lewat telepon, tapi mereka salah masak, lalu malah berdebat alih-alih memperbaikinya dengan sopan. Sesampainya di rumah, nasinya habis — padahal seharusnya dicantumkan dengan jelas di menu kalau memang tidak termasuk. Wanita di konter bersikap tidak sopan, tapi seorang staf pria baik hati dan membantu saya mengembalikan uang.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hello Irtiza,

You were quick to post a negative review, which is your choice, but the version of events you describe is not accurate.



Your husband (I’m assuming) called in the order, and what my wife heard (the “disrespectful” woman, as you called her) was deso chicken. She explained that we don’t have that dish, to which he replied that “every Chinese food restaurant has it.” She asked if he meant Basil Chicken, and he said yes, twice. She read the full order back, he confirmed it again, and the order was prepared as usual.



When your husband arrived to pick up the food, my wife double-checked the order and asked again if it was Basil Chicken (She asked twice and read it back then checked again upon pickup). He said, “That’s not what I ordered—I wanted deso chicken.” She explained again that we don’t have that, handed him a menu, and he pointed to General Tso’s Chicken under Chef’s Specials. She said “No problem,” remade the dish immediately, and asked if he wanted anything else. He said no. We were happy to correct the misunderstanding on both sides.



About 15 minutes later, you called saying there was no rice. My wife calmly explained that rice does not come with entrées—it never has since we opened. You became upset, raised your voice, and repeatedly said that every other Chinese food restaurant includes rice and that we should change our menu. You also insisted that you “always come here” and we give you rice, but that’s simply not the case unless you order one of our combination plates, which do include rice.



When you came in, you continued to shout the same thing. At that point, I came out of the office because I could hear the exchange from the back. Ning is one of the kindest people you could meet, and it takes a lot to shake her. For me to have to step in says a lot about how the situation escalated.



Even then, I listened to your entire side of the story without interrupting. A customer who witnessed the whole thing tried to speak up, but you repeatedly talked over him as well. Despite all that, I offered you a full refund and told you to keep the chicken dish.



You came into our restaurant yelling at my wife, and now you’ve called her disrespectful while telling a very different story from what actually happened.

We always do our best to treat people kindly and fairly—and we simply ask for the same respect in return.

reviews.author: Danielle Shiek
reviews.text: The owners are so friendly and the boba is amazing their rice noodle is my favorite food there 😄
reviews.textTranslated: Pemiliknya sangat ramah dan boba-nya luar biasa, mie beras mereka adalah makanan favorit saya di sana 😄

reviews.author: Shabih Hassan
reviews.text:
Incredible Halal Chinese Restaurant!
What an amazing find in the Mansfield area! The food was absolutely delicious, a perfect blend of flavors with an authentic Chinese taste that’s hard to find. It’s so nice to see a Halal Chinese restaurant offering such a wide variety of dishes. Everything we tried was flavorful, fresh, and well-prepared. The atmosphere was welcoming, and the service was great too. Highly recommend this spot to anyone looking for something unique and tasty in the area!
reviews.textTranslated:
Restoran Cina Halal yang Luar Biasa!
Temuan yang luar biasa di area Mansfield! Makanannya sungguh lezat, perpaduan rasa yang sempurna dengan cita rasa Cina autentik yang sulit ditemukan. Senang sekali melihat restoran Cina Halal menawarkan begitu banyak variasi hidangan. Semua yang kami coba lezat, segar, dan disiapkan dengan baik. Suasananya ramah, dan pelayanannya juga luar biasa. Sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini bagi siapa pun yang mencari sesuatu yang unik dan lezat di area ini!

reviews.author: Kim Marques
reviews.text: We ordered delivery and it came pretty quickly and everything was still hot. The general tsos chicken was delicious, egg rolls were humongous and the perfect texture. My boyfriend says the crab rangoons are the best near us and the frozen lemonade were great(bonus for the cute spoon!) The only downside was the spare ribs I got as my side were really dry and the pork fried rice was just ok. We will definitely be trying more food from here! Wish we had tried it sooner!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami memesan pesan antar dan pesanan datang cukup cepat, dan semuanya masih panas. Ayam General Tsos-nya lezat, lumpianya besar sekali, dan teksturnya sempurna. Pacar saya bilang kepiting rangoon adalah yang terbaik di dekat kami, dan limun bekunya enak sekali (bonus untuk sendoknya yang lucu!). Satu-satunya kekurangannya adalah iga babi yang saya pesan karena sisi saya terlalu kering, dan nasi goreng babinya biasa saja. Kami pasti akan mencoba lebih banyak makanan dari sini! Andai saja kami mencobanya lebih awal!

reviews.author: Brittney Pereira
reviews.text:
Very nice people and place. Great chef.
Very nice atmosphere.
Thank you!
reviews.textTranslated:
Orang-orangnya dan tempatnya sangat ramah. Kokinya hebat.
Suasananya juga sangat nyaman.
Terima kasih!

reviews.author: Jason Lin
reviews.text:
This place is very cool! Crab Rangoons are delicious, light, and crispy-fried to perfection.
I enjoyed browsing at the tea selection, and other drink options they had and noticed they had a tea tasting session that you can book. Would like to come back and check it out again!
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat ini sangat keren! Crab Rangoon-nya enak, ringan, dan digoreng hingga renyah sempurna.
Saya menikmati melihat-lihat pilihan teh dan minuman lain yang mereka tawarkan, dan saya perhatikan mereka memiliki sesi mencicipi teh yang bisa dipesan. Saya ingin kembali dan mencobanya lagi!

reviews.author: Rick Schwartz
reviews.text: This ten-store street "mall" has two of Mansfield's best take-out (or very casual eat-in) eateries: Cousin's and Wicked Tea Cafe. Don't be fooled by the unassuming scene when you enter The Wicked, as I call it. All the action happens in the back where they turn out an amazing array of consistently excellent dishes, cooked quickly to order. My favorites are definitely the Pad Thai, scallion pancakes, and fried rice, but that's barely skimming the top of the menu. At the register is where the drinks happen: every form of tea and slushies, with boba, in mango, watermelon, and coconut, if you want, or just premium tea and coffee. They also have a second room full of coffees and teas by the bag, and lots of gorgeous tea sets you can look at while waiting for your food. The seating is what I would call "after school teen hangout", which makes it great for small families with restless kids. Last, not least, the folks at the counter, are as friendly as you're going to find in Mansfield.
reviews.textTranslated: "Mal" jalanan dengan sepuluh toko ini memiliki dua tempat makan terbaik di Mansfield untuk dibawa pulang (atau makan di tempat dengan suasana santai): Cousin's dan Wicked Tea Cafe. Jangan tertipu oleh suasana sederhana saat Anda memasuki The Wicked, sebutan saya untuk tempat ini. Semua keseruan terjadi di bagian belakang, tempat mereka menyajikan berbagai hidangan luar biasa yang selalu lezat, dimasak dengan cepat sesuai pesanan. Favorit saya jelas Pad Thai, panekuk daun bawang, dan nasi goreng, tetapi itu baru sebagian kecil dari menu mereka. Di kasir, tempat minuman tersedia: berbagai macam teh dan minuman beku, dengan boba, rasa mangga, semangka, dan kelapa, jika Anda mau, atau hanya teh dan kopi premium. Mereka juga memiliki ruangan kedua yang penuh dengan kopi dan teh dalam kantong, dan banyak set teh cantik yang dapat Anda lihat sambil menunggu makanan Anda. Tempat duduknya saya sebut "tempat nongkrong remaja sepulang sekolah", yang membuatnya cocok untuk keluarga kecil dengan anak-anak yang aktif. Terakhir, dan yang tak kalah penting, para staf di konter sangat ramah, seperti yang akan Anda temukan di Mansfield.

reviews.author: Sarieh Abou Chaer
reviews.text: Very nice people. Tasty food and Bubba Bubble tea
reviews.textTranslated: Orang-orangnya sangat ramah. Makanannya enak dan Bubba Bubble Tea juga enak.

reviews.author: phoenixbyrd
reviews.text: I have always ordered from Quans and have tried other places but was never impressed enough to switch. Wicked Tea Cafe has absolutely won me over with just one visit!!! Normally I despise egg rolls but because all the other food was so amazing I decided to try the egg rolls and was so happy I did! The crab ragoons were insanely delicious! Honestly this place brought back memories of how Chinese takeout used to taste like. Everyone else could really learn a thing or 50 from this restaurant! Amazing food, definitely have a new customer!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya selalu memesan dari Quans dan sudah mencoba tempat lain, tetapi tidak pernah cukup terkesan untuk beralih. Wicked Tea Cafe benar-benar memikat saya hanya dengan sekali kunjungan!!! Biasanya saya benci lumpia, tetapi karena semua makanan lainnya begitu lezat, saya memutuskan untuk mencoba lumpia dan sangat senang! Ragoon kepitingnya luar biasa lezat! Jujur saja, tempat ini mengingatkan saya pada bagaimana rasanya makanan Cina dibawa pulang dulu. Semua orang benar-benar bisa belajar satu atau dua hal dari restoran ini! Makanannya luar biasa, pasti akan ada pelanggan baru!

reviews.author: Yzzi Nyah 唐獅子
reviews.text: The food is really good, the perfect balance of noodle and vegetables. You know how you go some place and you typically get more noodles that aren't evenly coated and cooked, well this place seems to have it down pat where there's enough vegetables where it's satisfying. The tea selection here is amazing, I didn't book a tasting but I did have the jasmine tea on the menu and smelled the tea in the back space. Amazing. I don't love around there but I will plan to return 🍵
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar enak, keseimbangan sempurna antara mi dan sayuran. Anda tahu kan, biasanya di suatu tempat kita mendapatkan lebih banyak mi yang bumbunya tidak merata dan tidak matang sempurna, nah, tempat ini tampaknya berhasil menyajikan mi yang porsinya cukup banyak sehingga terasa memuaskan. Pilihan teh di sini luar biasa, saya tidak memesan sesi mencicipi tetapi saya memesan teh melati yang ada di menu dan mencium aroma tehnya di ruang belakang. Luar biasa. Saya tidak tinggal di sekitar sana tetapi saya berencana untuk kembali 🍵

reviews.author: Explorer
reviews.text: Good
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus

reviews.author: Michael ellis mullan
reviews.text: Love this place. Offers HALAL choices for Muslims and the owner is knowledgeable and kind. The head of house is friendly and attentive. The lunch specials you can't beat and the boba is awesome
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka tempat ini. Menawarkan pilihan HALAL untuk Muslim dan pemiliknya berpengetahuan luas dan ramah. Kepala restorannya ramah dan perhatian. Menu makan siang spesialnya sangat enak dan boba-nya luar biasa.

reviews.author: Mubeen Kamani
reviews.text:
Wicked Tea is an absolute gem and easily one of our favorite finds in Massachusetts. What immediately stood out to us—and honestly sealed the deal before we even ordered—is that they serve halal meat. That’s a rare and deeply appreciated commitment, especially for families like ours who are always on the lookout for halal-friendly spots that don’t compromise on flavor or vibe.

This place is a true mom-and-pop shop, and you can feel the love in both the food and the service. The owners were incredibly friendly and welcoming. You can tell they genuinely care about creating a space where people can enjoy good food, relax, and feel right at home.

We started off with the teriyaki chicken appetizer and scallion pancakes. The chicken was tender and full of flavor, and knowing it was halal just made every bite feel even better. The scallion pancakes were crispy and delicious—perfectly golden and not too greasy.

The chicken herbal fried rice was something special. It had a subtle herby taste that made it really unique compared to the usual fried rice dishes, and it was cooked perfectly. The General Tso’s chicken was crispy, just the right amount of sweet and spicy, and you guessed it—100% halal!

Now let’s talk about the boba. We tried the watermelon mango with green apple bursting boba, and the lychee peach with blueberry pearls. Both drinks were refreshing, creative, and the perfect finish to a solid meal. They also have a super chill tea area with comfy seating, board games, and a really cozy setup that makes you want to hang out for a while. It’s not just a place to grab food—it’s a place to enjoy your time.

One spicy highlight was their wasabi dipping sauce—a total flavor bomb! It brought the heat, but in a way that made you want to keep going back for more.

Bottom line: Halal food, amazing service, fresh flavors, and a laid-back vibe—Wicked Tea checks all the boxes. It’s the kind of place you want to support, return to, and recommend to others. If you’re looking for a solid halal-friendly spot with personality and heart, this is it.
reviews.textTranslated:
Wicked Tea adalah permata tersembunyi dan dengan mudah menjadi salah satu tempat favorit kami di Massachusetts. Yang langsung menarik perhatian kami—dan jujur ​​saja, langsung membuat kami yakin sebelum memesan—adalah mereka menyajikan daging halal. Itu adalah komitmen yang langka dan sangat kami hargai, terutama untuk keluarga seperti kami yang selalu mencari tempat ramah halal yang tidak mengorbankan rasa atau suasana.

Tempat ini benar-benar toko keluarga, dan Anda dapat merasakan cinta dalam makanan dan pelayanannya. Pemiliknya sangat ramah dan menyambut. Anda dapat melihat bahwa mereka benar-benar peduli untuk menciptakan ruang di mana orang dapat menikmati makanan enak, bersantai, dan merasa seperti di rumah sendiri.

Kami memulai dengan hidangan pembuka ayam teriyaki dan panekuk daun bawang. Ayamnya empuk dan penuh rasa, dan mengetahui bahwa itu halal membuat setiap gigitan terasa lebih nikmat. Panekuk daun bawangnya renyah dan lezat—berwarna keemasan sempurna dan tidak terlalu berminyak.

Nasi goreng herbal ayamnya sungguh istimewa. Nasi gorengnya memiliki rasa herbal yang lembut sehingga sangat unik dibandingkan dengan nasi goreng biasa, dan dimasak dengan sempurna. Ayam General Tso-nya renyah, manis dan pedasnya pas, dan seperti yang Anda duga—100% halal!

Sekarang mari kita bicara tentang boba. Kami mencoba semangka mangga dengan boba apel hijau, dan leci persik dengan mutiara blueberry. Kedua minuman itu menyegarkan, kreatif, dan penutup yang sempurna untuk hidangan yang lezat. Mereka juga memiliki area teh yang sangat santai dengan tempat duduk yang nyaman, permainan papan, dan suasana yang sangat nyaman yang membuat Anda ingin berlama-lama di sana. Ini bukan hanya tempat untuk makan—ini adalah tempat untuk menikmati waktu Anda.

Salah satu yang pedas dan menggugah selera adalah saus wasabi mereka—benar-benar ledakan rasa! Rasanya pedas, tetapi dengan cara yang membuat Anda ingin terus mencicipinya.

Intinya: Makanan halal, pelayanan luar biasa, cita rasa segar, dan suasana santai—Wicked Tea memenuhi semua kriteria. Ini adalah jenis tempat yang ingin Anda dukung, kunjungi kembali, dan rekomendasikan kepada orang lain. Jika Anda mencari tempat ramah halal yang solid, berkarakter, dan ramah, inilah tempatnya.

reviews.author: Erika Yih
reviews.text:
Summary: GREAT bubble tea, solid Americanized Chinese food, reasonable prices. Traditional tea tasting available.

I have eaten here once. For what it is, which is more Americanized Chinese food than authentic, it does the job. But I come regularly for bubble tea because my PT is in the area. Their bubble tea really hits the spot! They have a stamp card now for bubble tea, and I asked today if they could give me an extra stamp for last week if I could find the receipt in my car. She said no need and gave me the extra stamp! The teenagers working the register are polite, but they're still training, so definitely ask one of the Chinese ladies if you want a real answer. I usually get the passion fruit bubble tea with less sugar and no ice, but today took a risk with mango peach slush boba. I was slightly scared of having food regret if it wasn't as good as my usual order, but let me tell you - I've been drinking bubble tea for 20 years, and it was possibly the best bubble tea drink I've ever had!!! And prices are reasonable. Will be back again and again.

There's also a tea room in the back with authentic teas from China. You can organize a free tea tasting if interested in that.
reviews.textTranslated:
Ringkasan: Teh boba yang ENAK, makanan Tionghoa ala Amerika yang mantap, harga terjangkau. Tersedia pencicipan teh tradisional.

Saya pernah makan di sini sekali. Untuk apa adanya, yang lebih merupakan makanan Tionghoa ala Amerika daripada otentik, cukup memuaskan. Tapi saya sering datang untuk minum teh boba karena PT saya ada di daerah ini. Teh boba mereka benar-benar pas! Mereka sekarang memiliki kartu stempel untuk teh boba, dan hari ini saya bertanya apakah mereka bisa memberi saya stempel tambahan untuk minggu lalu jika saya dapat menemukan struknya di mobil saya. Dia bilang tidak perlu dan memberi saya stempel tambahan! Remaja yang bekerja di kasir sopan, tetapi mereka masih dalam pelatihan, jadi pastikan untuk bertanya kepada salah satu wanita Tionghoa jika Anda ingin jawaban yang sebenarnya. Saya biasanya memesan teh boba markisa dengan sedikit gula dan tanpa es, tetapi hari ini saya mengambil risiko dengan boba mangga persik. Saya sedikit takut menyesal jika rasanya tidak seenak pesanan saya biasanya, tetapi percayalah - saya sudah minum teh boba selama 20 tahun, dan ini mungkin minuman teh boba terbaik yang pernah saya minum!!! Dan harganya terjangkau. Akan kembali lagi dan lagi.

Ada juga ruang teh di belakang dengan teh asli dari Tiongkok. Anda dapat mengatur sesi mencicipi teh gratis jika tertarik.

reviews.author: Marilyn
reviews.text: I haven’t tried the food yet but the boba drinks are so 🤩
reviews.textTranslated: Aku belum coba makanannya tapi minuman boba nya enak banget 🤩

reviews.author: Faith Alves
reviews.text: this place is delicious. got a crab rangoon, egg roll, sesame chicken and pork fried rice - totally worth it. the sauce on the chicken was EXCELLENT, crab rangoon was DELICIOUS, classic egg roll - everything was packed to the brim with flavor. So glad we have a place like this near me.
reviews.textTranslated: tempat ini lezat. memesan kepiting rangoon, lumpia, ayam wijen, dan nasi goreng babi - benar-benar sepadan. saus pada ayamnya LUAR BIASA, kepiting rangoonnya ENAK, lumpia klasik - semuanya penuh dengan rasa. Senang sekali ada tempat seperti ini di dekat saya.

reviews.author: Andrew Stacey
reviews.text: Probably our new choice for Chinese takeout in the area. We live in Easton and have tried most places around, usually to much disappointment. We discovered Wicked Tea on Google and gave it a try. Food was very fresh and had great flavor. The owner is super sweet and was very attentive when we ate in, along with our 3 year old. The place was busy with many orders going out the door while we were there. We will definitely be ordering food from Wicked Tea again.
reviews.textTranslated: Mungkin ini akan menjadi pilihan baru kami untuk makanan Cina pesan antar di daerah ini. Kami tinggal di Easton dan telah mencoba sebagian besar tempat di sekitar sini, biasanya dengan hasil yang mengecewakan. Kami menemukan Wicked Tea di Google dan mencobanya. Makanan sangat segar dan rasanya enak. Pemiliknya sangat ramah dan sangat perhatian saat kami makan di sana, bersama dengan anak kami yang berusia 3 tahun. Tempat itu ramai dengan banyak pesanan yang keluar saat kami berada di sana. Kami pasti akan memesan makanan dari Wicked Tea lagi.

reviews.author: Prajakta Limaye
reviews.text: Loved the vegetable lo mein, chicken lo mein and the hot and sour soup was too good! We also get their milk tea boba tea regularly.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka lo mein sayur, lo mein ayam, dan kuah asam pedasnya juga enak! Kami juga rutin pesan boba milk tea mereka.

reviews.author: Bailey Mooers
reviews.text: This place is amazing. Me and my sister go here all the time, and have never once had a less than amazing food and dining experience. 10/10 would recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini luar biasa. Saya dan adik perempuan saya sering ke sini, dan pengalaman bersantap dan makanannya selalu luar biasa. 10/10, saya rekomendasikan.

reviews.author: Richard Riddle
reviews.text:
The owners are extremely cordial and helpful. I've witnessed the owners rushing outside to help someone who's car was smoking in the parking lot (not a customer).
Or how they hand out free bubble tea to my son while we wait, and the food's great to boot.
reviews.textTranslated:
Para pemiliknya sangat ramah dan suka membantu. Saya pernah menyaksikan pemiliknya bergegas keluar untuk membantu seseorang yang mobilnya mengeluarkan asap di tempat parkir (bukan pelanggan).
Atau bagaimana mereka membagikan bubble tea gratis kepada putra saya saat kami menunggu, dan makanannya juga enak.

reviews.author: Rochelle Ann
reviews.text: Delicious food! Loved the crab rangoon especially!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak banget! Suka banget sama crab rangoon-nya!

reviews.author: Cris Stan
reviews.text: My partner enjoyed the food, I have not enjoyed the fried rice, but the bubble tea and crab rangoon were good.
reviews.textTranslated: Pasangan saya menikmati makanannya, saya tidak menikmati nasi gorengnya, tetapi bubble tea dan crab rangoonnya enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review! We're glad to hear that your partner enjoyed the food and that you liked the bubble tea and crab rangoon. However, we're sorry to hear that the fried rice wasn’t to your liking. We truly wish you had let us know while you were here—we would have been happy to offer another option to make sure you had a meal you enjoyed!

As for the 3/5 rating for service, we always strive to go above and beyond to welcome our guests with fast and friendly service. If there was anything we could have done better during your visit, we’d really appreciate your feedback so we can continue to improve.

We hope you’ll give us another try in the future!

reviews.author: Tiffany Torres
reviews.text: The best tea I’ve ever had!!!!!!! Everyone is so friendly and helpful!
reviews.textTranslated: Teh terbaik yang pernah saya minum!!!!!!! Semua orang sangat ramah dan membantu!

reviews.author: Rachel
reviews.text: There are so many Chinese places in the area, but this is the only one where the food tastes fresh and homemade, instead of greasy and loaded with MSG. The pork buns are delicious with pillowy soft dough. The bubble tea is very sweet, but I know alot of people like it that way. I tried their ramen, but didn’t care for it. It lacked the depth of flavor you get when stock is homemade. I have tried other dishes that have been phenomenal, so maybe they still working on the ramen recipe.
reviews.textTranslated: Ada banyak restoran Cina di daerah ini, tetapi hanya restoran ini yang makanannya terasa segar dan buatan sendiri, alih-alih berminyak dan penuh MSG. Bakpao babinya lezat dengan adonan yang lembut dan empuk. Teh bubble-nya sangat manis, tetapi saya tahu banyak orang menyukainya. Saya mencoba ramen mereka, tetapi tidak menyukainya. Rasanya kurang kaya rasa yang didapat dari kaldu buatan sendiri. Saya sudah mencoba hidangan lain yang hasilnya fenomenal, jadi mungkin mereka masih mengembangkan resep ramennya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts! We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed our fresh, homemade-tasting dishes and found our pork buns to be delicious. It means a lot to us to stand out in such a vibrant food scene.

We’d like to share a little more about our ramen. To bring our customers an authentic experience, we import the broth, noodles, chashu, and menma directly from Japan. While we would love to make the broth in-house, our kitchen space is limited, and this was the best way for us to offer ramen without compromising quality. We truly appreciate your feedback and will continue to work on making every dish exceptional for our customers.

Regarding our bubble tea, we keep our creations free of fructose or extra sugars. We aim to let the natural ingredients shine, and we’re always happy to adjust the sweetness level or prepare it in the traditional style with just milk, tea, and boba. Please feel free to let us know your preferences during your next visit!

We’re so glad you’ve enjoyed other dishes and hope you’ll continue to explore our menu. Thank you again for your support and feedback—it helps us grow and improve!

reviews.author: salvatore harland
reviews.text: A great experience at Wicked Tea Cafe. I brought my wife and kids and we had crab Rangoon, scallion pancakes, chicken fingers, sesame chicken, chicken fried rice, and boba. Some of the best food around! We waited about 10 minutes for food. There is plenty of parking, enough room to sit comfortably and eat. The staff was very friendly and the food was terrific. We will definitely be back soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman yang luar biasa di Wicked Tea Cafe. Saya mengajak istri dan anak-anak, dan kami menikmati kepiting rangoon, panekuk daun bawang, chicken finger, ayam wijen, nasi goreng ayam, dan boba. Salah satu makanan terbaik di sini! Kami menunggu sekitar 10 menit untuk makanannya. Tempat parkirnya luas, cukup luas untuk duduk dengan nyaman dan makan. Stafnya sangat ramah dan makanannya luar biasa. Kami pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Joe Healy
reviews.text: This is a tough review to write. I always keep my reviews real for my integrity. This review is from a single trip. The staff were very friendly. There was multiple people that had their food there. I believe there was 6-7 tables. One long one. Half had boxes on them. I didn't mind sitting next to the box if it was a hidden gem. I had the shrimp with lobster sauce combo with a chicken wing and rice. I also had a lychee boba tea. The lobster sauce came out, it was lighter in color than most.  No big deal, it taste that matters. I had a single bite and it was bad. My stomach even growled at me. I tried a shrimp. It was extremely overcooked, rubbery and almost mealy. I tried one more bite and it wasn't happening. I can only think of one other time I thought the meal, it was that bad. The chicken wing looked promising. It was dry and just okay. The flavor of the lychee tea was good. The boba was thick and extra chewy. Not sure if I would go back.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini ulasan yang sulit untuk ditulis. Saya selalu menjaga ulasan saya tetap apa adanya demi integritas saya. Ulasan ini dari satu perjalanan. Stafnya sangat ramah. Ada banyak orang yang makan di sana. Saya yakin ada 6-7 meja. Satu meja panjang. Setengahnya berisi kotak. Saya tidak keberatan duduk di sebelah kotak jika itu adalah permata tersembunyi. Saya memesan udang dengan saus lobster combo dengan sayap ayam dan nasi. Saya juga memesan teh boba leci. Saus lobsternya keluar, warnanya lebih terang dari kebanyakan. Tidak masalah, yang penting adalah rasa. Saya makan satu gigitan dan rasanya tidak enak. Perut saya bahkan keroncongan. Saya mencoba udang. Itu sangat terlalu matang, kenyal, dan hampir seperti tepung. Saya mencoba satu gigitan lagi dan itu tidak terjadi. Saya hanya bisa memikirkan satu kali lagi saya pikir makanannya, seburuk itu. Sayap ayamnya tampak menjanjikan. Itu kering dan lumayan. Rasa teh leci enak. Boba-nya kental dan sangat kenyal. Tidak yakin apakah saya akan kembali.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're genuinely sorry to hear that your experience with us didn’t meet your expectations. We always strive to provide high-quality food and a comfortable dining atmosphere, and we wish you had brought these concerns to our attention right away. We would have been more than happy to address and fix any issues to ensure you had a more enjoyable visit.

Regarding the boxes on the tables, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. As a small restaurant with limited space, we’ve been preparing for the two busiest days of the year for Chinese food, which required us to temporarily use some tables for storage. We understand how this might have impacted your experience, and we appreciate your understanding during this busy time.

We value your feedback and take it to heart. Your comments about the shrimp and chicken wing will be shared with our kitchen team to ensure improvements are made. 

We’d love the chance to make things right if you decide to visit us again. Your satisfaction is incredibly important to us, and we hope we can earn back your trust in the future.

Warm regards,
Wicked Tea Cafe Team

reviews.author: Caroline
reviews.text: Very happy to have this place by us! Best value Chinese food in Mansfield ! Perfect takeout option!
reviews.textTranslated: Senang sekali kami bisa menginap di sini! Makanan Cina dengan harga terbaik di Mansfield! Pilihan sempurna untuk dibawa pulang!

reviews.author: Salvage Angel
reviews.text: Wicked Tea is a fantastic addition to the Mansfield area. Large selection of bubble tea, slush, and hot tea drinks. Great Chinese food, lots of options that other spots in town don’t offer. Halal options as well is a great touch. The best part is the customer service. We take out from Wicked Tea a few times a month, and food and drinks always great.
reviews.textTranslated: Wicked Tea adalah tambahan yang fantastis untuk area Mansfield. Banyak pilihan bubble tea, slush, dan minuman teh panas. Makanan Cina yang lezat, banyak pilihan yang tidak ditawarkan tempat lain di kota ini. Pilihan halal juga merupakan sentuhan yang bagus. Bagian terbaiknya adalah layanan pelanggan. Kami memesan minuman dari Wicked Tea beberapa kali sebulan, dan makanan serta minumannya selalu lezat.

reviews.author: Ollie LeChien
reviews.text:
When I  arrived and was greeted by a friendly lady, maybe owner, sitting and destringing snow peas, I knew this was different. This food is the best Chinese outside of Boston.... reminds me of authentic Chinese from NYC.
Fresh crisp veg, meat not overcooked, not greasy. I am so happy 😊
reviews.textTranslated:
Ketika saya tiba dan disambut oleh seorang wanita ramah, mungkin pemiliknya, yang sedang duduk dan mengupas kacang polong, saya tahu ini berbeda. Makanan ini adalah makanan Cina terbaik di luar Boston.... mengingatkan saya pada makanan Cina asli dari New York City.
Sayurannya segar dan renyah, dagingnya tidak terlalu matang, dan tidak berminyak. Saya sangat senang 😊
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for sharing your experience! We’re delighted that the fresh, hands-on approach resonated with you—it’s all about bringing the authentic flavors and quality of NYC and Boston a little closer to home. We're thrilled you enjoyed our fresh veggies and perfectly cooked dishes, and we can’t wait to welcome you back soon.

reviews.author: Jessica Lambiase
reviews.text:
We FINALLY found good Chinese takeout near our new house!!!! We stopped in for milk tea and decided to get a few snacks to bring home too and we’re so happy we did!

Pan fried dumplings were FULL, crispy, and not doughy. The scallion pancakes were so crispy i couldn’t stop eating it. The ponzu given with it also was really good and tastes a little different and less salty than the ponzu we’re usually given at other places.

We were also very happy to learn that they offer oolong on the weekends for the milk tea and I highly recommend trying as your base tea
reviews.textTranslated:
Akhirnya kami menemukan tempat makan Chinese takeaway yang enak di dekat rumah baru kami!!!! Kami mampir untuk minum milk tea dan memutuskan untuk membeli beberapa camilan untuk dibawa pulang juga, dan kami sangat senang melakukannya!

Pangsit gorengnya penuh, renyah, dan tidak lembek. Pancake daun bawangnya sangat renyah sampai saya tidak bisa berhenti memakannya. Saus ponzu yang diberikan juga sangat enak dan rasanya sedikit berbeda dan tidak terlalu asin dibandingkan ponzu yang biasanya kami dapatkan di tempat lain.

Kami juga sangat senang mengetahui bahwa mereka menawarkan oolong di akhir pekan untuk milk tea dan saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk mencobanya sebagai teh dasar Anda.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for giving us a try! We're thrilled to be your new go-to spot for Chinese takeout! It’s wonderful to hear that you loved the pan-fried dumplings and the crispy scallion pancakes—our ponzu is a unique touch, so we’re glad it stood out! And yes, oolong as a milk tea base is a weekend favorite, so we’re delighted you enjoyed it! Looking forward to your next visit for more delicious discoveries!

reviews.author: Luanna
reviews.text: The perfect cozy spot & my favorite Chinese food in the area! They have a variety of healthy food options, gluten free, halal and vegetarian. They also have boba tea and an amazing collection of high-quality loose leaf teas directly from farms in China! The owners are always very kind and welcoming and keep the atmosphere nice, warm, and clean.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang nyaman dan sempurna & makanan Cina favorit saya di daerah ini! Mereka memiliki berbagai pilihan makanan sehat, bebas gluten, halal, dan vegetarian. Mereka juga memiliki boba tea dan koleksi teh daun berkualitas tinggi yang luar biasa langsung dari perkebunan di Cina! Pemiliknya selalu sangat ramah dan menyambut serta menjaga suasana tetap nyaman, hangat, dan bersih.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re thrilled to be your favorite cozy spot for Chinese food and tea. It's important to us to offer a variety of options to suit everyone, and we're glad you enjoyed everything from our gluten-free and halal offerings to our high-quality loose-leaf teas. We love creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere, so your appreciation means the world to us. Can’t wait to see you again soon!

reviews.author: Світлана Станіславська
reviews.text: Very cozy place with a friendly and polite personnel. Delicious Thai tea which I tried first time in my life, but would definitely recommend 👍
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya nyaman banget, stafnya ramah dan sopan. Teh Thailand-nya enak banget, baru pertama kali coba, tapi pasti akan saya rekomendasikan 👍
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled you enjoyed the cozy atmosphere and found our team welcoming. We're especially happy that your first taste of Thai tea was a hit! It’s a favorite around here, and we’re so glad you’d recommend it. Hope to see you again soon for more delicious discoveries!

reviews.author: Ashley Hammach
reviews.text: Amazing. 🤩 we went here specifically for the halal menu. They didn’t have halal beef but that was an issue with the vendor prices so I’m really hoping to eventually try that in the future. The food was cooked perfectly and it really hit the Chinese food spot. The workers were so friendly and we just felt super welcome. Thank you so much 😊
reviews.textTranslated: Luar biasa. 🤩 Kami datang ke sini khusus untuk menu halal. Mereka tidak punya daging sapi halal, tapi itu masalah harga dari pemasok, jadi saya sangat berharap bisa mencobanya di masa mendatang. Makanannya dimasak dengan sempurna dan benar-benar sesuai dengan selera makanan Cina. Para pekerja sangat ramah dan kami merasa sangat disambut. Terima kasih banyak 😊
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Ashley, 
Thank you so much for your review. We will have beef again soon, Just waiting to hear back from 1 vendor. Glad to hear everything else was on point though. Thank you again!

reviews.author: Erica
reviews.text: I haven’t had the food yet, but their bobba tea was great. they have an area where you can buy tea from China. I took home sticky rice tea, and I am really enjoying it. They are so friendly and helpful there. Greeted by a very friendly man that was very helpful. He and a woman there took such interest in making the tea exactly the way we wanted it. They were also so helpful showing us all the different teas you can bring home to make. if they put this much pride into the Tra and their customer service, I can only imagine that their food is great as well.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya belum mencoba makanannya, tapi teh bobba mereka enak sekali. Mereka punya area khusus untuk membeli teh dari Tiongkok. Saya membawa pulang teh ketan, dan saya sangat menikmatinya. Mereka sangat ramah dan membantu. Disambut oleh seorang pria yang sangat ramah dan sangat membantu. Pria itu dan seorang wanita di sana sangat antusias untuk membuat teh sesuai keinginan kami. Mereka juga sangat membantu menunjukkan kepada kami berbagai macam teh yang bisa kami bawa pulang untuk diseduh. Jika mereka begitu bangga dengan Tra dan layanan pelanggan mereka, saya yakin makanan mereka juga akan lezat.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for sharing your experience! We’re delighted that you enjoyed the boba tea and had a chance to explore our selection of teas from China. It was a pleasure helping you find the perfect tea, and we’re thrilled to hear you’re loving the sticky rice tea at home! We truly put our heart into every cup and every interaction, so your kind words mean a lot. We can’t wait for you to try our food next time—hope it’s just as enjoyable for you!

reviews.author: Jessica Brannon
reviews.text:
Great food and always great customer service 💕
This place  is one of my favs
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanannya enak dan layanan pelanggannya juga selalu luar biasa 💕
Tempat ini salah satu favorit saya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for the love! We're so happy to be one of your favorites, and it’s always a pleasure to serve you. Looking forward to seeing you again soon! 💕

reviews.author: Dianne Swartz
reviews.text: Stopped by  for some tea, stayed for the wonderful food!  Staff is very friendly!
reviews.textTranslated: Mampir untuk minum teh, tapi akhirnya betah karena makanannya enak sekali! Stafnya sangat ramah!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for the kind words! We're thrilled you enjoyed both the tea and the food. Our team always loves welcoming new faces, and we look forward to seeing you again soon!

reviews.author: pro traders
reviews.text: We found the egg shell in the chicken fried rice and the response from owner was sorry
reviews.textTranslated: Kami menemukan cangkang telur di nasi goreng ayam dan tanggapan dari pemiliknya hanya "maaf".
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hello, 
I'm sorry about the egg shell in the rice. You dealt with my wife last night and she did offer to remake the rice and even offered a refund so I'm a little puzzled by your review. If there is ever an issue we always try to make it right. The offer still stands for a new order or a refund on the rice regardless. Just ask for Ian and I'll get it sorted.

reviews.author: Myra
reviews.text: Very tasty 🥰 and halal
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat enak 🥰 dan halal
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Myra, 
Thank you so much for your review! We are glad you enjoyed the meal!!

reviews.author: Abdul Hanan
reviews.text: This place serves halal CHINESE food.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini menyajikan makanan Tionghoa halal.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for your 5-star review! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed our halal Chinese food. We take pride in offering a variety of delicious options for everyone, and we're so glad it made an impression on you! We hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: Kristina C
reviews.text:
A gem of a place in Mansfield! They have exciting rotating specials so you can try something delicious. Everyone is so friendly in there everytime we grab take out. Portions are large and the food is A+.

Still haven’t tried their tea offerings yet but they look impressive.

Don’t skip this place!
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat yang luar biasa di Mansfield! Mereka memiliki menu spesial yang berganti-ganti sehingga Anda dapat mencoba sesuatu yang lezat. Semua orang di sana sangat ramah setiap kali kami memesan makanan untuk dibawa pulang. Porsinya besar dan makanannya sangat enak.

Saya belum mencoba pilihan teh mereka, tetapi kelihatannya sangat menarik.

Jangan lewatkan tempat ini!
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re thrilled you enjoyed our food and friendly service! Our teas are definitely worth a try—hope to see you back soon!

reviews.author: Shell Cambridge
reviews.text: Amazing people amazing food got to try the dragon fruit and a new tea… food was delicious hot and fresh will go back for more!
reviews.textTranslated: Orang-orangnya luar biasa, makanannya luar biasa, saya berkesempatan mencoba buah naga dan teh baru… makanannya enak, panas, dan segar, saya pasti akan kembali lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner: So glad to hear you had a delicious experience! Thank you for the kind words—hope to see you back soon!

reviews.author: Janice Lincoln
reviews.text: Wonderful food, unusual and spectacular, different teas, I bought a white one but are many to choose from, and my favorite wz shrimp and broccoli stir fry. Service excellent will go back soon
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa, unik dan spektakuler, berbagai macam teh, saya membeli teh putih tetapi ada banyak pilihan lain, dan favorit saya adalah tumis udang dan brokoli. Pelayanannya sangat baik, saya akan segera kembali.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your lovely review! We're thrilled that you enjoyed our food and the variety of teas we offer. It's great to hear that the shrimp and broccoli stir fry was your favorite. We're also delighted that you found our service excellent. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

Warm regards,
The Wicked Tea Cafe Team

reviews.author: Christine Bailey
reviews.text: Had a wonderful afternoon at the Wicked Tea Cafe.  Owner made us a frozen mocha coffee that was out of this world. The food was outstanding and atmosphere was very friendly   Will return to sample the many frozen drinks and yummy food
reviews.textTranslated: Kami menikmati sore yang menyenangkan di Wicked Tea Cafe. Pemiliknya membuatkan kami kopi moka beku yang luar biasa enaknya. Makanannya juga luar biasa dan suasananya sangat ramah. Kami akan kembali untuk mencoba berbagai minuman beku dan makanan lezat lainnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for your kind review! We're so glad to hear you enjoyed the frozen mocha coffee and found our food outstanding. It's wonderful to know that you appreciated the friendly atmosphere. We look forward to welcoming you back to sample more of our frozen drinks and delicious food soon!

Warm regards,
The Wicked Tea Cafe Team

reviews.author: Ash Bailey
reviews.text:
Wicked Tea is an absolute gem! Not only is this a tea shop carrying small batch Chinese teas that the owner gets directly from the small farms, but this is an amazing Chinese food restaurant. The owners wife is the sweetest hardworking lady from China and you can tell how much passion she has when tasting the food. Her HOMEMADE crab rangoons are simply amazing—crispy, flavorful, and unlike any other I've had. I will be thinking about these Rangoon until I can get my hands on them again. The egg rolls are also handmade and amazing. The shrimp and broccoli was delicious and a big portion. The vegetable lo main noodle was my favorite. We also had amazing eggplant, curry rice noodles, and scallion pancakes. All delicious! Before eating, we had traditional tea service with Ian the owner and tasted a wide variety of delicious and aromatic teas during the service. It was so interesting and Ian told us all about the different teas and how they are made and grown. The iced boba tea is another highlight, with perfect textures and delightful flavors, at least 10 different ones. We had the taro flavor that was lovely. We took home 2 bags of tea from the shop and a bag of snowy owl coffee which is roasted on Cape Cod. Everything is done with a lot care and everything was fresh and delicious. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a fantastic tea and dining experience!
They have takeout and delivery as well!
---
reviews.textTranslated:
Wicked Tea benar-benar permata tersembunyi! Bukan hanya toko teh yang menjual teh Tiongkok berkualitas tinggi yang didapatkan langsung dari perkebunan kecil, tetapi juga restoran makanan Tiongkok yang luar biasa. Istri pemiliknya adalah wanita pekerja keras dan ramah dari Tiongkok, dan Anda bisa merasakan betapa besar semangatnya saat mencicipi makanannya. Crab rangoon buatannya sendiri sungguh luar biasa—renyah, beraroma, dan tidak seperti yang pernah saya coba sebelumnya. Saya akan terus memikirkan rangoon ini sampai saya bisa mendapatkannya lagi. Lumpia telurnya juga buatan tangan dan luar biasa. Udang dan brokolinya lezat dan porsinya besar. Mie lo main sayur adalah favorit saya. Kami juga memesan terong, mie beras kari, dan panekuk daun bawang yang luar biasa. Semuanya lezat! Sebelum makan, kami menikmati layanan teh tradisional bersama Ian, pemiliknya, dan mencicipi berbagai macam teh yang lezat dan aromatik selama layanan tersebut. Sangat menarik dan Ian menceritakan kepada kami semua tentang berbagai jenis teh, cara pembuatannya, dan cara penanamannya. Es teh boba adalah daya tarik lainnya, dengan tekstur yang sempurna dan rasa yang lezat, setidaknya ada 10 rasa berbeda. Kami memesan rasa taro yang sangat enak. Kami membawa pulang 2 kantong teh dari toko dan satu kantong kopi Snowy Owl yang dipanggang di Cape Cod. Semuanya dilakukan dengan sangat hati-hati dan semuanya segar serta lezat. Sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini bagi siapa pun yang mencari pengalaman minum teh dan bersantap yang fantastis!

Mereka juga menyediakan layanan bawa pulang dan antar!

---
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed both our tea selection and our Chinese food offerings. It’s heartwarming to know that our homemade dishes, especially the crab rangoons, left such a lasting impression. We’re also thrilled that you appreciated our traditional tea service and the care we put into sourcing and preparing our teas. Your kind words motivate us to continue delivering the best possible experience. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

Warm regards,
The Wicked Tea Cafe Team

reviews.author: Zain Abidin
reviews.text:
Not only do they go above and beyond for service they go above and beyond to make sure the food is halal.

Great bubble tea flavors, definitely the best in the area. I personally like their seasme chicken, chicken lo-mein and the chicken with garlic sauce.

They are slowly becoming a staple in the community.
reviews.textTranslated:
Mereka tidak hanya memberikan pelayanan yang luar biasa, tetapi juga memastikan makanan yang disajikan halal.

Rasa bubble tea-nya enak sekali, pasti yang terbaik di daerah ini. Saya pribadi suka rasa ayam wijen, ayam lo-mein, dan ayam dengan saus bawang putih.

Mereka perlahan-lahan menjadi tempat favorit di komunitas ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your kind words and support! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our bubble tea flavors and our various chicken dishes. Ensuring our food meets your dietary needs is very important to us. We're honored to be becoming a staple in the community and look forward to serving you again soon!

Warm regards,
The Wicked Tea Cafe Team

reviews.author: Chris Hupper
reviews.text: Great all around! We'll definitely return as often as we can!
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat bagus! Kami pasti akan kembali sesering mungkin!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for your kind words! We're delighted to hear that you had a great experience with us. We look forward to welcoming you back as often as you can visit!

Warm regards,
The Wicked Tea Cafe Team

reviews.author: Danny Cheng
reviews.text: Good boba. Great prices! The chicken wings were super soft and juicy!! Atmosphere was very chill.
reviews.textTranslated: Boba-nya enak. Harganya terjangkau! Sayap ayamnya super lembut dan juicy! Suasananya santai banget.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your kind review! We're glad to hear that you enjoyed our boba and found our prices to be great. It's wonderful to know that our chicken wings were a hit – we take pride in making sure they're always super soft and juicy.

We're also pleased that you enjoyed the chill atmosphere at Wicked Tea Cafe. Your support and feedback mean a lot to us. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for more delicious boba and tasty bites!

reviews.author: writinginpen
reviews.text: Love love LOVE this place! I’m a big tea person, so when I saw the Wicked Tea sign in the plaza almost a year ago, I could not WAIT for it to open! I’ve been going there for a few months now and I just have to say, they are consistently amazing. The owners and staff are so friendly every time I go in and the atmosphere is lovely. Their slush tea with bursting boba is my go-to and a staple of the summer! Hits the spot every time. My friends and I have been getting food here, and the combo portions are a good value and tastes great too! My friend kept raving about the crab rangoon. The food is always hot and fresh and out impressively fast after ordering. Best new addition to Mansfield; I hope they stay a long, long time! :)
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget, SUKA banget tempat ini! Saya penggemar berat teh, jadi ketika melihat papan nama Wicked Tea di plaza hampir setahun yang lalu, saya langsung BANGET menunggunya buka! Saya sudah ke sana beberapa bulan ini dan harus saya akui, mereka selalu luar biasa. Pemilik dan stafnya sangat ramah setiap kali saya datang, dan suasananya sungguh menyenangkan. Teh slush mereka dengan boba yang meledak-ledak adalah andalan saya dan wajib dicoba di musim panas! Selalu pas di lidah. Saya dan teman-teman sering makan di sini, dan porsi kombonya terjangkau dan rasanya juga enak! Teman saya terus memuji crab rangoon-nya. Makanannya selalu panas, segar, dan keluarnya sangat cepat setelah dipesan. Tambahan baru terbaik di Mansfield; semoga mereka bertahan lama! :)
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying our tea and food offerings. It's always a pleasure to see familiar faces and we appreciate your support since day one.

We're delighted that you love the slush tea with bursting boba – it's definitely a summer favorite! And it's great to hear that our combo portions and crab rangoon have hit the mark.

Your kind words about our staff and atmosphere mean a lot to us. We'll continue to strive to make every visit a delightful experience for you and your friends. Thank you for choosing Wicked Tea Cafe and for being a part of our journey in Mansfield. We look forward to serving you for many years to come!

reviews.author: Elio Vojkollari
reviews.text: Very good
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat bagus

reviews.author: Shantell
reviews.text: Love this place! So far I’ve tried the shrimp fried rice, pork fried rice, vegetable lo mein, chicken fingers, chicken teriyaki, beef teriyaki, boneless spareribs, general tso chicken, sesame chicken, sweet and sour chicken, Korean wings, honey garlic wings, spring rolls, and crab ragoon. Everything was delicious. Crab Rangoon were a little too sweet for me. The sauce on the  Korean wings were more like a gravy. Didn’t really care for it. Wouldn’t order those again but will definitely continue to eat here and try other things on the menu. Best Chinese in the area. Highly recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka tempat ini! Sejauh ini saya sudah mencoba nasi goreng udang, nasi goreng babi, lo mein sayur, chicken fingers, ayam teriyaki, daging sapi teriyaki, iga tanpa tulang, ayam general tso, ayam wijen, ayam asam manis, sayap ayam Korea, sayap ayam madu bawang putih, lumpia, dan crab rangoon. Semuanya enak. Crab rangoon agak terlalu manis untuk saya. Saus pada sayap ayam Korea lebih seperti kuah kental. Saya kurang menyukainya. Saya tidak akan memesan itu lagi, tetapi pasti akan terus makan di sini dan mencoba menu lainnya. Restoran Cina terbaik di daerah ini. Sangat direkomendasikan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review and for being a loyal customer! We are thrilled to hear that you've enjoyed such a wide variety of our dishes, from the shrimp fried rice to the crab rangoon. We appreciate your feedback about the sweetness of the crab rangoon and the sauce on the Korean wings. Your comments help us improve and better cater to your tastes. We’re delighted to be your go-to spot for Chinese cuisine in the area and look forward to serving you again soon. Highly recommend trying our new dishes on your next visit!

Best regards,
Wicked Tea Cafe

reviews.author: wwegrl23
reviews.text: Good food and love their coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak dan saya suka kopinya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for your review! We're so glad you enjoyed the food and loved our coffee! It’s always great to hear from happy customers, and we look forward to serving you again soon!

reviews.author: Hairgoddess1
reviews.text: I’ve been coming to Wicked Tea since it opened and find the atmosphere warm and welcoming.  The food is literally amazing and their tea selection is vast.  I recommend everyone to go in and sit at the beautiful tea table and try some of the different teas they have.  I just love this place and I’m so happy I found it!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sudah datang ke Wicked Tea sejak pertama kali dibuka dan merasakan suasananya hangat dan ramah. Makanannya sungguh luar biasa dan pilihan tehnya sangat beragam. Saya merekomendasikan semua orang untuk datang dan duduk di meja teh yang indah sambil mencoba berbagai macam teh yang mereka tawarkan. Saya sangat suka tempat ini dan saya sangat senang menemukannya!!!

reviews.author: VL
reviews.text: Terrible
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat buruk

reviews.author: Marty Cegelka
reviews.text: Have only had their Vietnemese iced coffee and it is delicious. Will be back to try more.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya baru mencoba es kopi Vietnam mereka dan rasanya enak sekali. Saya akan kembali untuk mencoba menu lainnya.

reviews.author: Julianne Parker
reviews.text: Pork fried rice was dry, general tso was like grilled chicken in a hardly spicy sauce,  I did like the chicken fingers won't be back
reviews.textTranslated: Nasi goreng babi kering, ayam General Tso seperti ayam panggang dengan saus yang hampir tidak pedas, saya suka chicken fingers-nya tapi tidak akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Daniel Clancy
reviews.text: Excellent food
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan yang sangat enak

reviews.author: William O'Brien
reviews.text: As a life long devotee of Quan's Kitchen I think I'm converted. Wicked Tea Cafe was amazing. They have Chinese, Japanese, and Thai dishes. The owners were lovely and the quality was too notch. Highly recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Sebagai penggemar setia Quan's Kitchen, saya rasa saya sudah bertobat. Wicked Tea Cafe sungguh luar biasa. Mereka menyediakan hidangan Cina, Jepang, dan Thailand. Pemiliknya ramah dan kualitasnya sangat baik. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Eric Kraus
reviews.text: This place is WICKED AWESOME
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini LUAR BIASA LUAR BIASA

reviews.author: Paul Kasparian
reviews.text: Better than most Chinese food in the area
reviews.textTranslated: Lebih enak daripada kebanyakan makanan Cina di daerah ini.

reviews.author: Owen D
reviews.text: They let me use the bathroom once on a run. 10/10 customer service
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka mengizinkan saya menggunakan kamar mandi sekali saat sedang berlari. Pelayanan pelanggan 10/10.

reviews.author: Cory Mullins
reviews.text: Such a cozy place to sit and enjoy a tea with your meal. The fruit and milk teas are very flavorful, and the dumplings were pan fried to perfection. Reasonably priced as well.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang nyaman untuk duduk dan menikmati teh sambil makan. Teh buah dan teh susunya sangat lezat, dan pangsitnya digoreng dengan sempurna. Harganya juga cukup terjangkau.

reviews.author: Chaz Harrison
reviews.text: We popped in for some boba tea and ended up getting a full taste-test treatment. It was a super chill experience, and I ended up getting some loose leaf tea I probably never would have tried otherwise (Lychee black tea). Ian was great and definitely knows his stuff. If you have time to stick around for the whole process (which was very cool to watch), I highly recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami mampir untuk menikmati boba tea dan akhirnya menikmati suguhan uji rasa yang lengkap. Pengalamannya sangat santai, dan saya akhirnya menikmati teh daun lepas yang mungkin tidak akan pernah saya coba sebelumnya (teh hitam leci). Ian sangat hebat dan benar-benar ahli di bidangnya. Jika Anda punya waktu untuk menyaksikan seluruh prosesnya (yang sangat keren untuk ditonton), saya sangat merekomendasikannya.

reviews.author: Brianna Cote
reviews.text: The boba was amazing! I moved here last year from RI and haven't been able to find any boba nearby. This is so good, definitely our spot now! The food was also very good. Thank you again! Speedy delivery as well!!
reviews.textTranslated: Boba-nya luar biasa! Saya pindah ke sini tahun lalu dari Rhode Island dan belum menemukan boba di dekat sini. Rasanya enak sekali, pasti jadi pilihan kami sekarang! Makanannya juga sangat enak. Terima kasih sekali lagi! Pengirimannya juga cepat!

reviews.author: Devin Miller
reviews.text:
Great food I got the boba tea
French,fries and dumplings the fried dumplings are REALLY JUICY the French fries were and crispy and delicious the boba tea was great and super sweet they have so many options for the boba the atmosphere is really amazing  and an introvert would love it they were really nice free advice anything under lined in red on the menu they don’t have
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanannya enak sekali, saya pesan boba tea.
Pangsit gorengnya SANGAT LEZAT, kentang gorengnya renyah dan lezat, boba teanya enak dan sangat manis. Mereka punya banyak pilihan boba, suasananya sangat menakjubkan dan seorang introvert pasti akan menyukainya. Mereka sangat ramah dan memberikan saran gratis. Apa pun yang digarisbawahi merah di menu, mereka tidak punya.

reviews.author: Hannah Kersh (Sekushī Hokage)
reviews.text: Had an amazing experience meeting the staff and owner, Ian!  Amazing place for hot tea, boba tea of different flavors, or Chinese food!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya mendapat pengalaman luar biasa bertemu dengan staf dan pemiliknya, Ian! Tempat yang menakjubkan untuk minum teh panas, teh boba dengan berbagai rasa, atau makanan Cina!

reviews.author: Patrick McDonough
reviews.text: The boba teas are wicked nice! Addionally, super good food! Looking forward to the ramen in the future.
reviews.textTranslated: Teh boba-nya enak banget! Makanannya juga super enak! Tak sabar untuk mencoba ramennya nanti.

reviews.author: Shauna Gaughan
reviews.text: Wow! A+! I brought my kids in for an early dinner and we couldn’t decide what we wanted to try, so we got a bunch and everything was fabulous! The crab Rangoon were better than I’ve ever had. Scallion pancakes were flavorful and not too greasy! The chicken pad Thai was full of flavor and not too heavy. The steamed pork buns and chicken fingers were also delicious! The owner found out my daughter likes spicy things and went to the kitchen to get a homemade hot sauce from China for her to try! (She loved it!). We left with mango boba which was also fantastic. We have full bellies and a fridge full of leftovers. Can’t wait to come back!
reviews.textTranslated: Wah! A+! Saya mengajak anak-anak makan malam lebih awal dan kami bingung mau coba apa, jadi kami pesan banyak dan semuanya luar biasa! Kepiting Rangoon-nya lebih enak dari yang pernah saya coba. Pancake daun bawangnya enak dan tidak terlalu berminyak! Pad Thai ayamnya kaya rasa dan tidak terlalu berat. Bakpao babi kukus dan chicken finger-nya juga lezat! Pemiliknya tahu putri saya suka makanan pedas dan langsung ke dapur untuk mengambilkan sambal buatan sendiri dari Cina untuk dicobanya! (Dia suka sekali!). Kami pulang dengan boba mangga yang juga fantastis. Perut kami kenyang dan kulkas penuh sisa makanan. Tak sabar untuk kembali!

reviews.author: Cory C (Ccc5sports)
reviews.text:
Chicken Pad Thai - very good. Not spicy. Room for leftovers.

General Combo - very good sauce and chicken. Could use more rice and 1 more crab Rangoon (only got 2). This is not spicy at all but still enjoyed this meal.

Peach Boba Tea - For a medium it’s huge. Love the tea and the pearls. Will get again.

This is our new spot without a doubt. Very good. Add a tad more rice and Rangoon and it’s perfect.
reviews.textTranslated:
Pad Thai Ayam - sangat enak. Tidak pedas. Masih ada sisa.

General Combo - saus dan ayamnya sangat enak. Bisa tambah nasi dan 1 crab Rangoon lagi (hanya dapat 2). Ini sama sekali tidak pedas, tapi tetap menikmati hidangan ini.

Teh Boba Persik - Untuk ukuran sedang, porsinya sangat besar. Suka teh dan mutiara tapiokanya. Akan memesan lagi.

Ini tempat favorit baru kami, tanpa diragukan lagi. Sangat enak. Tambahkan sedikit nasi dan Rangoon lagi, maka akan sempurna.

reviews.author: FarukanPaunch
reviews.text: My wife and I went to the newly opened Mansfield location this past weekend, and I have to say I LOVE the food!  Its my new favorite stop for Chinese cuisine, I can't wait to sample more from the menu, such as the Ramen, I know it will be a smash hit and will be coming many more times.  I never had bubble tea before but this place has me hooked on it!  You won't be sorry when you try them!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya dan istri saya pergi ke lokasi Mansfield yang baru dibuka akhir pekan lalu, dan saya harus mengatakan saya SANGAT menyukai makanannya! Ini adalah tempat favorit baru saya untuk masakan Cina, saya tidak sabar untuk mencoba lebih banyak menu, seperti Ramen, saya tahu itu akan menjadi sangat populer dan saya akan datang lebih sering lagi. Saya belum pernah mencoba bubble tea sebelumnya, tetapi tempat ini membuat saya ketagihan! Anda tidak akan menyesal mencobanya!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much! That really means a lot. And we're happy you loved the food!!

reviews.author: Andrea Wierzbicki
reviews.text: Recently received a Wicked Tea gift basket as a birthday gift- Truly impressive! And now that I am.on website I can see what an exceptional value it is. Can't wait to visit store in person - looks charming, and also to learn more about this healthy new endeavor of tea drinking!
reviews.textTranslated: Baru-baru ini menerima keranjang hadiah Wicked Tea sebagai hadiah ulang tahun - sungguh mengesankan! Dan sekarang setelah saya membuka situs webnya, saya bisa melihat betapa luar biasanya nilainya. Tak sabar untuk mengunjungi tokonya langsung - tampilannya menawan, dan juga untuk mempelajari lebih lanjut tentang tren baru minum teh yang menyehatkan ini!

reviews.author: Sunnysal
reviews.text: I wished it was listed as an Adult Only Vape shop and not a Tea Shop.  Took my kids here to buy tea  for family Christmas presents and couldn't even go in to shop. Sadly since it said nothing about it being predominately a vape shop we drove 40 minutes to get here because it looked like it had a great selection.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya berharap toko ini terdaftar sebagai toko vape khusus dewasa dan bukan toko teh. Saya membawa anak-anak saya ke sini untuk membeli teh sebagai hadiah Natal keluarga dan bahkan tidak bisa masuk untuk berbelanja. Sayangnya, karena tidak ada keterangan bahwa toko ini sebagian besar menjual vape, kami berkendara selama 40 menit untuk sampai ke sini karena kelihatannya memiliki banyak pilihan produk yang bagus.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Sunnysal,
Yes we were a vape shop to start. We do still sell vape products as well as tea so per town law we had to stay ​21+ and that is listed right in the About Us section on our website. I'm sorry that you missed it.
Unfortunately, the vape end of things still pays the rent in this location. The tea has been picking up over the past year though. Our hopes are to eventually move the vape products out and keep just tea here.

reviews.author: Michael Karpelson
reviews.text: This is a true hidden gem -- we were driving by randomly and decided to stop in. If you already know your teas, they have a unique selection that you won't find anywhere else in the Boston area. But the real treat is coming by when the owner is there (you can call ahead to make sure) and sitting down for a tea tasting. I've never met anyone as passionate and knowledgeable about tea!
reviews.textTranslated: Ini benar-benar permata tersembunyi -- kami kebetulan lewat dan memutuskan untuk mampir. Jika Anda sudah mengenal berbagai jenis teh, mereka memiliki pilihan unik yang tidak akan Anda temukan di tempat lain di area Boston. Tetapi yang paling istimewa adalah datang saat pemiliknya ada di sana (Anda bisa menelepon terlebih dahulu untuk memastikan) dan duduk untuk mencicipi teh. Saya belum pernah bertemu siapa pun yang begitu bersemangat dan berpengetahuan tentang teh!

reviews.author: Aron Blye (Roy_Al_Lyons)
reviews.text: Amazing selections of tea with staff just as knowledgeable. Everything is high quality and the friendly staff ready to answer any questions you have. A definite place to check out for tea lovers!
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan tehnya luar biasa, dengan staf yang juga berpengetahuan luas. Semuanya berkualitas tinggi dan staf yang ramah siap menjawab pertanyaan apa pun. Tempat yang wajib dikunjungi bagi para pecinta teh!

reviews.author: S T
reviews.text: The owners were very nice and knowledgeable about teas. They are not pushing with the sell either. Bought a few bags of tea and they gave us a few samples as well. Looking forward to visit the shop again.
reviews.textTranslated: Pemiliknya sangat ramah dan berpengetahuan luas tentang teh. Mereka juga tidak memaksa untuk menjual. Kami membeli beberapa kantong teh dan mereka juga memberi kami beberapa sampel. Kami berharap dapat mengunjungi toko ini lagi.

reviews.author: Kayla Smith
reviews.text: This is definitely my new favorite tea shop. I've never been more impressed by a place like this before! The owners sat and had tea with us (sampled a few different ones), talked about their different products and were super knowledgeable! I can't wait to go back and get some more teas! Their prices are on point, and well worth it!
reviews.textTranslated: Ini jelas toko teh favorit baru saya. Saya belum pernah terkesan dengan tempat seperti ini sebelumnya! Pemiliknya duduk dan minum teh bersama kami (mencicipi beberapa jenis teh yang berbeda), membicarakan berbagai produk mereka dan sangat berpengetahuan! Saya tidak sabar untuk kembali dan membeli lebih banyak teh! Harganya pas, dan sangat sepadan!

reviews.author: Dan Shachat
reviews.text: I bought a diffuser and a bag of tea and was given so many FREE extra items with my purchase. In addition the tea quality is exceptional. If you are looking for a place to buy the best quality tea look no further.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya membeli diffuser dan sekantong teh, dan mendapat banyak barang tambahan GRATIS dengan pembelian saya. Selain itu, kualitas tehnya luar biasa. Jika Anda mencari tempat untuk membeli teh berkualitas terbaik, tidak perlu mencari lagi.

reviews.author: B Colman
reviews.text: This is the best tea shop around. Ian has a vast knowledge and selection of tea in his shop. He travels to China regularly to meet with local farmers who supply him with his phenomenal products. Let’s just say he is the real deal. You can also try anything you want in the shop plus he has a great selection of glassware for tea and cannabis. Check this place out, you won’t regret it.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah toko teh terbaik di sekitar sini. Ian memiliki pengetahuan dan pilihan teh yang luas di tokonya. Ia rutin bepergian ke Tiongkok untuk bertemu dengan petani lokal yang memasok produk-produk fenomenalnya. Jujur saja, dia memang ahlinya. Anda juga bisa mencoba apa pun yang Anda inginkan di toko ini, ditambah lagi ia memiliki banyak pilihan gelas untuk teh dan ganja. Kunjungi tempat ini, Anda tidak akan menyesal.

reviews.author: Erik T
reviews.text: Made a special trip to this place and it was well worth it. Ian was extremely knowledgeable and took his time explaining the different types of tea and how they are processed. As a coffee guy he had his work cut out for him, but won me over! Definitely will be returning.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya melakukan perjalanan khusus ke tempat ini dan itu sangat berharga. Ian sangat berpengetahuan dan meluangkan waktu untuk menjelaskan berbagai jenis teh dan cara pengolahannya. Sebagai pencinta kopi, ia memiliki banyak pekerjaan yang harus dilakukan, tetapi berhasil memikat saya! Pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Jose Morales
reviews.text: Found Wicked Tea on the way back from a relaxing weekend in Boston. Great way to end the weekend and rekindle my love of teas. Very knowledgeable, friendly and inviting. Great learning experience. Will definitely be back soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menemukan Wicked Tea dalam perjalanan pulang dari akhir pekan yang santai di Boston. Cara yang bagus untuk mengakhiri akhir pekan dan membangkitkan kembali kecintaan saya pada teh. Sangat berpengetahuan, ramah, dan menyenangkan. Pengalaman belajar yang luar biasa. Pasti akan segera kembali!

reviews.author: ジョニー
reviews.text: Definitely set aside some time to sit and try some tea when you come here. If all you know is western style tea & tea bags then what you'll find here is a whole new tea experience. If you like what you try then there's everything you need to get set up, like a variety of tea cups and pots (I picked one of the "snowball" sets, the one on the right in the picture) and things like infusers and variable temperature kettles to heat up your water. I loved the Fuding white and sticky rice flavored puerh but every tea that I tried while visiting was great. Whether you're already into tea or maybe just starting to check it out, wicked tea is the place to be
reviews.textTranslated: Pastikan untuk meluangkan waktu sejenak untuk duduk dan mencoba teh saat Anda datang ke sini. Jika Anda hanya mengenal teh dan kantong teh ala Barat, maka Anda akan menemukan pengalaman minum teh yang benar-benar baru di sini. Jika Anda menyukai apa yang Anda coba, tersedia semua yang Anda butuhkan untuk menyiapkan teh, seperti berbagai cangkir dan teko teh (saya memilih salah satu set "bola salju", yang ada di sebelah kanan pada gambar) dan perlengkapan seperti infuser dan ketel dengan suhu yang dapat disesuaikan untuk memanaskan air. Saya menyukai puerh rasa beras ketan putih Fuding, tetapi setiap teh yang saya coba saat berkunjung sangat lezat. Baik Anda sudah menyukai teh atau mungkin baru mulai mencobanya, Wicked Tea adalah tempat yang tepat.

reviews.author: Christopher Swenor
reviews.text:
I'm so happy that Wicked Tea opened close to my house. I'm a huge fan of tea, and they have an amazing selection of Chinese Teas.
Every time I go in they have been extremely helpful and informative. Try to plan some extra time when you visit so you can sample before you buy and get nerdy about tea with the owners.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya sangat senang Wicked Tea buka di dekat rumah saya. Saya penggemar berat teh, dan mereka memiliki pilihan Teh Cina yang luar biasa.
Setiap kali saya datang, mereka sangat membantu dan informatif. Cobalah untuk meluangkan waktu ekstra saat berkunjung agar Anda dapat mencicipi sebelum membeli dan berdiskusi lebih dalam tentang teh dengan pemiliknya.
